TITLE: Greetings
DESCRIPTION: Manage greeting messages for your server

SETTINGS.PAGE_DESC: Configure welcome and farewell messages for your guild

WELCOME.TITLE: Welcome Messages
WELCOME.DESC: Configure welcome messages for new members

DM_WELCOME.TITLE: DM Welcome Message
DM_WELCOME.DESC: Send new members a private welcome message
DM_WELCOME.INFO: This message will be sent as a direct message to new members. Note: Members with DMs disabled will not receive this.

BOOST.TITLE: Boost Messages
BOOST.DESC: Celebrate members who boost your server
BOOST.INFO: This message is sent when a member boosts the server.

AUTOROLE.TITLE: Automatic Roles
AUTOROLE.DESC: These roles will be automatically assigned to new members

AUTOROLE_INFO: The selected roles will be automatically given to all new members upon joining.
AUTOROLE_MULTI_HINT: You can select multiple roles (Ctrl/Cmd + Click)

HELP.TITLE: Help & Tips
HELP.WELCOME_TEXT: Greet new members with personalized messages and embeds.
HELP.DM_TEXT: Send new members a private welcome DM.
HELP.BOOST_TEXT: Celebrate server boosters with a special message.
HELP.VERIFICATION_TEXT: New members must click a button, solve a captcha, or react with an emoji before roles are assigned.
HELP.REACTION_ROLES_TEXT: Create emoji-role messages. Members react with emojis to receive roles.
HELP.INVITE_TRACKING_TEXT: Different welcome messages depending on the invite link used.
HELP.IMAGE_TEXT: Generated welcome banner with the new member's avatar.

VERIFICATION.TITLE: Verification
VERIFICATION.DESC: New members must verify before gaining full access
VERIFICATION.CHANNEL_DESC: The channel where the verification button/captcha is displayed
VERIFICATION.VERIFIED_ROLE_DESC: This role is assigned after successful verification
VERIFICATION.UNVERIFIED_ROLE_DESC: This role is assigned on join and removed after verification
VERIFICATION.MESSAGE_PH: Click the button to verify yourself!
VERIFICATION.EMOJI_DESC: The emoji used for reaction verification
VERIFICATION.SEND_PANEL_DESC: Sends the verification button to the selected channel
VERIFICATION.INFO: Verification ensures that new members are not bots. With 'Button' a simple click suffices, with 'Captcha' a math problem must be solved, with 'Reaction' members react with an emoji.

REACTION_ROLES.TITLE: Reaction Roles
REACTION_ROLES.DESC: Create messages where users react with emojis to receive or lose roles.
REACTION_ROLES.PANEL_DESC_PH: e.g. React with the matching emoji to receive a role.
REACTION_ROLES.CONFIRM_DELETE: Really delete this panel and all its mappings?
REACTION_ROLES.INFO: After creating a panel, you can send it to a channel. Members can then react with emojis to receive the assigned roles.

INVITE_TRACKING.TITLE: Invite Tracking
INVITE_TRACKING.DESC: Different welcome messages depending on the invite link used
INVITE_TRACKING.LABEL: Label
INVITE_TRACKING.INFO: When a new member joins through a configured invite link, the special message will be sent instead of the default welcome message.
